languages.text: Select an augment for Overdrive using the button below it's slot
languages.translation_comment:
Хинт на слоте внизу, который предлагает выбрать и гальванизировать слот
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1WaLkFbBxsBXjawtc5bf2xMLLo08twBkG/view?usp=drive_link

traits.locale_text: Select an augment for Overdrive using the button below it's slot
Select an augment for Overdrive using the button below it's slot

languages.text: If an augment has a galvanisation ability, press the button below that augment’s insertion to set it to galvanise and make its ability available in combat.
languages.translation_comment:
Hint on the bottom slot suggesting to select and galvanize a slot
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1WaLkFbBxsBXjawtc5bf2xMLLo08twBkG/view?usp=drive_link
languages.original_text: Select an augment for Overdrive using the button below it's slot

traits.locale_text: If the augment grants you an ability, press the button below its insertion to use the ability in combat
If an augment grants you a galvanisation ability, press the button below its insertion to use the galvanisation ability in combat.
If an augment grants you a galvanisation ability, press the button below its insertion to use the galvanisation ability in combat.
Use the key below an insertion to set an augment

languages.text: Если аугмент можно гальванизировать, нажмите кнопку под инсерцией, чтобы выбрать его способность для последующего использования в бою.
languages.original_text: If an augment has a galvanisation ability, press the button below that augment’s insertion to set it to galvanise and make its ability available in combat.

traits.locale_text: Нажмите кнопку под инсерцией, чтобы выбрать аугмент для гальванизации в бою
Нажмите кнопку под инсерцией, чтобы выбрать аугмент для гальванизации в бою

languages.text: Hat eine Augmentation eine Galvanisierungsfähigkeit, drücke die Taste unter dem Einsatz der Augmentation, um ihn auf 'Galavanisieren' zu setzen und die Fähigkeit für den Kampf zu aktivieren.
languages.original_text: If an augment has a galvanisation ability, press the button below that augment’s insertion to set it to galvanise and make its ability available in combat.

traits.locale_text: Hat eine Augmentation eine Galvanisierungsfähigkeit, drücke die Taste unter dem Einsatz der Augmentation, um ihn auf 'Galavanisieren' zu setzen und die Fähigkeit für den Kampf zu aktivieren.
Drücke die Taste unter einem Einsatz, um eine Augmentation zu konfigurieren

languages.text: Si une augmentation dispose d'une capacité de galvanisation, appuyez sur le bouton sous l'insertion correspondante pour lancer la galvanisation et rendre cette capacité disponible en combat.
languages.original_text: If an augment has a galvanisation ability, press the button below that augment’s insertion to set it to galvanise and make its ability available in combat.

traits.locale_text: Si une augmentation dispose d'une capacité de galvanisation, appuyez sur le bouton sous l'insertion correspondante pour lancer la galvanisation et rendre cette capacité disponible en combat.
Appuyez sur le bouton sous une insertion pour installer une augmentation.

languages.text: 若某个植入物拥有电激能力，可点击该植入物槽位下方的按钮使其进入电激状态，并在战斗中启用该能力。
languages.original_text: If an augment has a galvanisation ability, press the button below that augment’s insertion to set it to galvanise and make its ability available in combat.

traits.locale_text: 若某个植入物拥有电激能力，可点击该植入物槽位下方的按钮使其进入电激状态，并在战斗中启用该能力。

languages.text: Si un aumento tiene una capacidad de galvanización, pulsa el botón bajo su inserción para galvanizarlo y hacer que la capacidad esté disponible en combate.
languages.original_text: If an augment has a galvanisation ability, press the button below that augment’s insertion to set it to galvanise and make its ability available in combat.

traits.locale_text: Si un aumento tiene una capacidad de galvanización, pulsa el botón bajo su inserción para galvanizarlo y hacer que la capacidad esté disponible en combate.
Usa lo indicado abajo para establecer un aumento

languages.text: 選択したオーグメントスロットの下にあるキーを使用して、そのスロットに亜鉛メッキを施す。
languages.original_text: Use the key below the selected augment slot in order to galvanise it

languages.text: Bir ogmentin galvanizleme kabiliyeti varsa onu galvanizlemeye ayarlayıp çatışmada kabiliyetini kullanılabilir hâle getirmek için eklenti yuvasının altındaki düğmeye bas.
languages.original_text: If an augment has a galvanisation ability, press the button below that augment’s insertion to set it to galvanise and make its ability available in combat.

traits.locale_text: Bir ogmentin galvanizleme kabiliyeti varsa onu galvanizlemeye ayarlayıp çatışmada kabiliyetini kullanılabilir hâle getirmek için eklenti yuvasının altındaki düğmeye bas.
Bir ogmenti takmak için eklenti yuvasının altındaki tuşu kullan
